title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MALITLIT IN THE CITY OF LIPA

chunks.text:
H. No. 2349 / 55 OG No. 37, 7882 (September 14, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2495, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MALITLIT IN THE CITY OF LIPA

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Malitlit in the City of Lipa is converted into a barrio of said city to be known as the barrio of Malitlit.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
